message:
fix(tests): prevent sling tests from inheriting TMUX_PANE

Merge polecat/nux-mkd36irl: Clears TMUX_PANE env var in tests to
prevent test failures when running inside tmux.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -265,6 +265,7 @@ exit 0
 	t.Setenv(EnvGTRole, "mayor")
 	t.Setenv("GT_POLECAT", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_CREW", "")
+	t.Setenv("TMUX_PANE", "") // Prevent inheriting real tmux pane from test runner
 
 	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
 	if err != nil {
@@ -428,6 +429,7 @@ exit 0
 	t.Setenv(EnvGTRole, "mayor")
 	t.Setenv("GT_POLECAT", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_CREW", "")
+	t.Setenv("TMUX_PANE", "") // Prevent inheriting real tmux pane from test runner
 
 	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
 	if err != nil {
